scripts.build: bun --cwd packages/contracts build && bun --cwd apps/api build && bun --cwd apps/frontend build
scripts.lint: bun --cwd packages/contracts lint && bun --cwd apps/api lint && bun --cwd apps/frontend lint
scripts.format: bun --cwd packages/contracts format && bun --cwd apps/api format && bun --cwd apps/frontend format
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/contracts test && bun --cwd apps/api test && bun --cwd apps/frontend test
scripts.test:cov: bun --cwd packages/contracts run test:cov && bun --cwd apps/api run test:cov && bun --cwd apps/frontend run test:cov
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun --cwd apps/frontend typecheck
